zeroKnowledgePrivacy.label: Zero-Knowledge Privacy
zeroKnowledgePrivacy.desc: Your keys never leave your device

footer.philosophy: The philosophy that guides everything we build.

hero.title: The Living Memory
hero.description: A memory layer that you own, that works with any AI provider, and goes wherever you go.
hero.quote: It's not just technology — it's a philosophy about who owns your AI memory.
hero.descriptionExtended: A sovereign, portable, personal memory and dynamic context engine that works with all AI providers — your single, AI-native database.

providers.title: Works with {highlight}
providers.description: VIVIM is provider-agnostic. Connect your favorite models instantly.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.sectionDescription: The context window isn't just limited — it's actively working against you. And most 'solutions' make it worse.
problem.heading: Every AI Conversation
problem.description: The context window isn't just limited — it's actively working against you. And most 'solutions' make it worse.

stats.vectorMarket: Vector DB market validates the problem

contextWipe.title: The Context Wipe
contextWipe.stat: Conversations degrade after 15–20 messages, even with 1M token windows.
contextWipe.desc: Users rebuild context from scratch on every conversation. 3 years of domain knowledge, preferences, and decisions vanish the moment a tab closes.
contextWipe.vivimAnswer: The 8-layer context assembly engine + ACU persistent memory store. Every conversation is segmented into addressable memory units, classified across 9 types, and JIT-retrieved for every future interaction.
contextWipe.vivimGap: Requires onboarding friction — users must import history or begin building memory.

providerLockIn.title: The Provider Lock-in Trap
providerLockIn.hook: Your memory belongs to ChatGPT, not you
providerLockIn.stat: Switching AI providers means losing all accumulated context.
providerLockIn.desc: Switching AI providers means losing all accumulated context. Users are held hostage by memory moats that providers built intentionally.
providerLockIn.vivimAnswer: Provider-agnostic ACU store + import parsers for every major platform. ChatGPT history → VIVIM in one command. The same memory works across GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Ollama.
providerLockIn.vivimGap: Parser completeness is still growing. Full coverage requires community contributions.

copyPasteTax.title: The Copy-Paste Tax
copyPasteTax.stat: Hours every week rebuilding context from scratch.
copyPasteTax.desc: Knowledge workers spend 5–10 hours/week re-explaining their stack, preferences, team structure, and project history to AI tools that forgot everything overnight.
copyPasteTax.vivimAnswer: L0–L3 layers (Identity Core, Preferences, Topic, Entity) pre-load permanent context before every interaction.
copyPasteTax.vivimGap: Efficiency gain is only realized post-memory-accumulation. Takes 2–4 weeks of use.

middleBlackHole.title: The Middle Black Hole
middleBlackHole.hook: AI ignores context you explicitly provided
middleBlackHole.stat: 20+ percentage points worse accuracy for information in the middle of context.
middleBlackHole.desc: Stanford/Google/Anthropic research confirms 20+ percentage point accuracy drop for information in the middle of long context windows. Users unknowingly provide context the model never reads.
middleBlackHole.vivimAnswer: JIT retrieval (L5) surgically selects only the most relevant ACUs for each message — not a monolithic dump.
middleBlackHole.vivimGap: Requires strong embedding quality. Model-dependent retrieval accuracy at the edges.

dataHostage.title: The Data Hostage
dataHostage.hook: You can't export what you built
dataHostage.stat: Platforms lock your data in proprietary formats.
dataHostage.desc: Full ACU export to JSON, SQLite, or IPFS in documented open formats — readable without VIVIM.
dataHostage.vivimAnswer: Full ACU export to JSON, SQLite, or IPFS in documented open formats — readable without VIVIM.
dataHostage.vivimGap: Awareness gap — users don't feel this pain until they try to leave a platform.

enterpriseCompliance.title: The Enterprise Compliance Wall
enterpriseCompliance.hook: AI memory with no audit trail
enterpriseCompliance.stat: Enterprise needs audit trails that most platforms don't provide.
enterpriseCompliance.desc: Audit logging service + RBAC on memory collections + access grant manager. Enterprise tier adds compliance-grade audit log delivery.
enterpriseCompliance.vivimAnswer: Audit logging service + RBAC on memory collections + access grant manager. Enterprise tier adds compliance-grade audit log delivery.
enterpriseCompliance.vivimGap: SOC 2 Type II audit in progress. HIPAA BAA and FedRAMP are 12–18 months out.

aiMemorySurveillance.title: The AI Memory Surveillance Problem
aiMemorySurveillance.stat: Companies want to own their employees' AI context.
aiMemorySurveillance.desc: VIVIM Teams preserves individual sovereignty by design — per-seat memory, selective opt-in sharing only.
aiMemorySurveillance.vivimAnswer: VIVIM Teams preserves individual sovereignty by design — per-seat memory, selective opt-in sharing only.
aiMemorySurveillance.vivimGap: Hard to sell a sovereignty argument to the buyer when sovereignty protects the seller's employees.

localModelGap.title: The Local Model Gap
localModelGap.hook: Self-hosted AI has no persistent memory layer
localModelGap.stat: Local models lose all context between sessions.
localModelGap.desc: Provider-agnostic SDK with local SQLite + IPFS adapters. Self-hostable full stack in docker-compose.
localModelGap.vivimAnswer: Provider-agnostic SDK with local SQLite + IPFS adapters. Self-hostable full stack in docker-compose.
localModelGap.vivimGap: Niche audience today. But this is the highest-conviction community for a sovereign tool.

identityCollapse.title: The Identity Collapse
identityCollapse.hook: AI has no persistent model of who you are
identityCollapse.stat: Every conversation starts with a blank slate.
identityCollapse.desc: L0 Identity Core + DID-anchored user profile. Who you are is always loaded first.
identityCollapse.vivimAnswer: L0 Identity Core + DID-anchored user profile. Who you are is always loaded first.
identityCollapse.vivimGap: Identity richness is proportional to usage depth. New users experience this minimally until enough ACUs accumulate.

developerInfrastructureGap.title: The Developer Infrastructure Gap
developerInfrastructureGap.hook: No open standard for AI memory
developerInfrastructureGap.stat: Everyone builds their own memory layer from scratch.
developerInfrastructureGap.desc: ACU specification is an open standard anyone can implement. @vivim/sdk drops into LangChain/LlamaIndex as a memory backend.
developerInfrastructureGap.vivimAnswer: ACU specification is an open standard anyone can implement. @vivim/sdk drops into LangChain/LlamaIndex as a memory backend.
developerInfrastructureGap.vivimGap: Chicken-and-egg problem — developers need users to justify building, users need integrations to adopt.

multiAiFragmentation.title: The Multi-AI Fragmentation Problem
multiAiFragmentation.stat: Each AI tool has its own isolated memory.
multiAiFragmentation.desc: Single portable ACU database spans all providers. Import from every major platform.
multiAiFragmentation.vivimAnswer: Single portable ACU database spans all providers. Import from every major platform.
multiAiFragmentation.vivimGap: Requires users to be multi-AI in the first place. Most are still single-provider.

contextDecay.title: The Conversation Context Decay
contextDecay.desc: Context thermodynamics + memory compression in the Cortex system. ACU decay model promotes reinforced memories.
contextDecay.vivimAnswer: Context thermodynamics + memory compression in the Cortex system. ACU decay model promotes reinforced memories.
contextDecay.vivimGap: Thermodynamic model is still being validated. Real-world performance data needed.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.heading: What If AI Could
solution.description: Not just store — but understand, connect, and retrieve what matters — across every conversation, with every AI.

remembersEverything.title: Remembers Everything
remembersEverything.desc: Every conversation, preference, and detail is stored and organized intelligently.

intelligentRetrieval.title: Intelligent Retrieval
intelligentRetrieval.desc: Finds exactly what's relevant using semantic search — no more repeating yourself.

worksWithAnyAi.title: Works with Any AI
worksWithAnyAi.desc: Model-agnostic design means you can switch providers without losing your memory.

acus.title: Atomic Chat Units
acus.description: The fundamental building block that makes persistent, multi-scenario AI context possible
acus.descriptionExtended: Each conversation is broken into individually searchable, shareable units — giving you granular control over what your AI remembers and how it connects knowledge.
problemItems: Messages stored as giant blocks — like a whole chapter in one piece
Search for code, get entire 500-line response
Can't share just the solution without losing context
Insights buried in thousands of messages
solutionItems: Each thought is individually searchable & shareable
Find exactly the code snippet you need
Share granular insights with full context preserved
Knowledge connected, organized, and always accessible

rightsLayer.title: The Rights Layer
rightsLayer.heading: Your Data,
rightsLayer.description: Granular ownership tiers that adapt to context — personal, shared, or co-governed. Your AI memory, classified by you.

t0.label: Personal Only
t0.desc: You own it completely. No sharing, no governance.

t1.label: Personal-Likely
t1.desc: Probably personal, but open to classification review.

t2.label: Shared-Possibly
t2.desc: Could be shared — ready for co-governance setup.

t3.label: Co-Governed
t3.desc: Company gets governance. Dual-key required for exports.

t4.label: Restricted
t4.desc: Enhanced protection. Limited access even for you.

t5.label: Regulated
t5.desc: Never exports. Medical, legal, financial lockbox.

tdass.title: TDASS Co-Governance
tdass.desc: Companies get governance without custody. Your data stays in your vault — they only get a key share for designated scopes.
tdass.sunset: Sunset: Company share fades over time

tpdi.title: TPDI Classifier
tpdi.desc: ML-powered content classification that learns from your corrections. Gets smarter the more you use it.
tpdi.flow: Input → Feature Extraction → ML → Tier + Confidence

sentinel.title: The Sentinel
sentinel.heading: Know If Your Data
sentinel.description: 13 detection algorithms verify your data sovereignty — with cryptographic proof you can take to court.

canary.title: Canary System
canary.desc: Plant unique tokens in your conversations. When AI models reference them without authorization — detection confirmed.

evidence.title: Evidence Package
evidence.desc: Cryptographic proof package ready for legal action. Timestamps, Merkle proofs, model response evidence.

marketplace.title: The Marketplace
marketplace.heading: Monetize Your
marketplace.description: Sell your data on your terms — or keep it private. Zero-knowledge proofs let buyers verify without seeing.

step1.label: List
step1.desc: Select ACUs, set price, generate ZK proof

revenue.title: Revenue Split
revenue.desc: Fair distribution for co-governed data sales:

zkProofs.desc: Prove data properties without revealing content:

principles.title: Our Philosophy
principles.heading: Sovereign AI Memory
principles.description: VIVIM isn't just technology — it's a philosophy about who owns your AI memory.
principles.descriptionExtended: We believe your memories, preferences, and context should never be locked to a single provider. You should always have full control, visibility, and portability.

sovereign.title: Sovereign
sovereign.desc: You own your memory data completely. VIVIM never claims ownership — your AI memory belongs to you, not the platform.

personal.title: Personal
personal.desc: Your memory is yours alone. Unlike shared databases, VIVIM creates an individual memory layer unique to each user.

providerAgnostic.title: Provider Agnostic
providerAgnostic.desc: Switch between GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, or any AI model — your memory stays intact. No vendor lock-in, ever.

portable.title: Portable
portable.desc: Export your entire memory at any time in standard formats. Take your AI memory wherever you go.

useCaseAgnostic.title: Use-Case Agnostic
useCaseAgnostic.desc: Works for coding assistants, customer support, education, healthcare — any application that benefits from memory.

dynamicallyGenerated.title: Dynamically Generated
dynamicallyGenerated.desc: Context isn't static — it's built fresh for each interaction based on what you're doing right now.

contextLayers.title: The 8-Layer System
contextLayers.heading: Intelligent Context Assembly
contextLayers.description: Like CPU cache levels — each layer has different latency, specificity, and refresh rates.

l1.label: Global Preferences
l1.desc: How AI should respond to you

l3.label: Entity Context
l3.desc: People, projects, and tools you discuss
